full_text:
Linghu Yu 令狐愚
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Linghu Yu (令狐愚)was born in Taiyuan. Plotted against Sima Yi but died before it could begin. Linghu Yu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Linghu Yu lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
